finding_results.notes: Marisol now defines why Omar's materials require special handling, Omar is notified on-page before preservation, and the copy begins only after both June and Omar have answered and the restriction is recorded.

The opening now states the full three-path dilemma once, then later beats escalate it with new pressure: June makes exit materially viable, Gloria/Mohit define the cost of bargaining, the archive becomes self-incriminating, and the choice narrows into a custody threshold.
Leela initially gives a defensive partial answer, then corrects herself under Marisol's silent pressure without reusing the prior 'almost said' suppression pattern.
